zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF於1445年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親William Rugge30歲，母親Mary Ellen Wright26歲。他於1470年與Margaret Sheehan 16GGM在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1536年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF于1445年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，他的父亲William Rugge30岁，母亲Mary Ellen Wright26岁。他于1470年与Margaret Sheehan 16GGM在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1536年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt.
Danish: habitational name from a place so named in Denmark, or from the personal name Buggi, a short form of various German compound names.
Norwegian: of Danish origin (see 1 above), or a habitational name from the farm name Bogge of uncertain origin or from a shortened form of the placename Bugøynes in Finnmark.

variants.name: Bugg
meanings: English: nickname for an uncouth or weird man, from Middle English bugge ‘hobgoblin, bogy, scarecrow’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF was born in 1445, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Rugge, was 30 and his mother, Mary Ellen Wright, was 26. He married Margaret Sheehan 16GGM in 1470, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1536, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF est né en 1445, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Rugge, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mary Ellen Wright, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sheehan 16GGM en 1470, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1536, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF 1445 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Rugge 30 und seine Mutter Mary Ellen Wright 26. Er hat 1470 in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England Margaret Sheehan 16GGM geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1536 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF è nato il nel 1445 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Rugge, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mary Ellen Wright, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sheehan 16GGM nel 1470, nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1536, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Rugge 16GGFが1445年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Ruggeは30歳，母Mary Ellen Wrightは26歳であった。1470年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアでMargaret Sheehan 16GGMと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1536年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Rugge(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ellen Wright(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 Margaret Sheehan 16GGM(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF nasceu em 1445, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Rugge, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ellen Wright, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sheehan 16GGM em 1470, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1536, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF родился в 1445 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Rugge было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ellen Wright, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sheehan 16GGM в 1470 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1536 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF nació en 1445, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Rugge, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mary Ellen Wright, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Sheehan 16GGM en 1470, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1536, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años.
